stemHtml: What happens to the strength, the length, and the location of a normal shock wave when the Mach number (M) is increasing at positive lift? The strength of the shock wave...

options.a: decreases, its length decreases, and the shock wave moves downstream.
options.b: increases, its length increases, and the shock wave moves upstream.
options.c: decreases, its length decreases, and the shock wave moves upstream.
options.d: increases, its length increases, and the shock wave moves downstream.
